summary.summary: Removes legacy Omnipod submodules and platform-specific code paths and consolidates Omnipod support under OmnipodKit/OmniPumpManager. Specifically: deletes OmniBLE and OmniKit git submodules and .gitmodules entries (diff:e8826da257ca; file:cf03e8273754; file:564e2cc24f46; file:1b8a6d1fb66f) and bumps the OmnipodKit submodule to commit d68699c (commit:cf0209a1c793adb215764f087c7bc5e6df147643; file:60291cadef12). Removes OmniBLEPumpManager and OmnipodPumpManager usages and replaces them with OmniPumpManager in staticPumpManagers, DeviceDataManager, pump-type enums, and pump setup code (file:2478920a710c; file:f307c3e5278a; file:8874f8157e45; diff:e8826da257ca). Collapses separate "Omnipod Eros" / "Omnipod DASH" selection options into a single Omnipod/All Omnipod Types entry in HomeRootView and PumpConfigRootView and updates related localization entries (file:a3b74c4d866b; file:5594b79c883d; file:81981acd73f2; diff:e8826da257ca). Merges onboarding enum cases for omnipodEros/omnipodDash into a single .omni/.omnipod case and updates onboarding logic and picker settings; an inline FIXME notes that Eros' minimum basal-rate requirement is not yet handled (file:50ec6c64aeb9; file:ff5da396f898; commit:5ef26c3de79006f1ffdd60d70df1df53fb5c18a9; diff:e8826da257ca). Removes OmniBLE/OmniKit build targets, framework references, and test schemes from project files and workspace (file:07751cf172bd; file:554eca8365a3; file:f6494ea0313b; diff:e8826da257ca). Drops OmniBLE/OmniKit Crowdin localization sources and swiftformat exclusions and updates various build helper scripts (file:8a4c5c7b9469; file:7812fe424204; file:befe34768091; diff:e8826da257ca). Updates telemetry comment and PRIVACY_POLICY.md to reference OmnipodKit (file:e5a3670ed696; file:4d6ccdf1ca71; diff:e8826da257ca).
summary.userFacingImpact: UI: Pump-selection buttons are collapsed to a single Omnipod entry / label changes in Home and PumpConfig (file:a3b74c4d866b; file:5594b79c883d; file:81981acd73f2). Onboarding: the Omnipod basal-rate picker now uses a single .omni case and currently uses the DASH minimum (0 U/hr) even though Eros requires a 0.05 U/hr minimum — an inline FIXME records this gap (file:50ec6c64aeb9; pr:nightscout/Trio#1200; diff:e8826da257ca). Build/developer: OmniBLE/OmniKit submodules, targets, and workspace references were removed and OmnipodKit was bumped, which affects repository submodules and Xcode project/workspace configuration (file:cf03e8273754; file:07751cf172bd; file:f6494ea0313b; commit:cf0209a1c793adb215764f087c7bc5e6df147643). Potential safety concern: the inability to distinguish Eros vs DASH at the onboarding basal-rate step could allow an Eros user to set a 0 U/hr minimum when Eros requires 0.05 U/hr — this is noted in the change and should be reviewed by a human (file:50ec6c64aeb9; pr:nightscout/Trio#1200).
